title: gonystylus calophyllus
intro: Gonystylus calophyllus, a tropical tree species native to Southeast Asia, is a member of the family Thymelaeaceae, commonly known as the "meranti tree". The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gonystylus calophyllus include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include tea, decoctions, and infusions, often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
